title: Cardonz Vanilla
description: Quality of life mods, resource pack mods, optimization mods, and good resource packs and shaders in one modpack!
body:
Quality of life mods, resource pack mods, optimization mods, and good resource packs and shaders in one modpack!

I originally made this modpack as a fork of Fabulously Optimzied, with more QoL mods and what not. Eventually, I kept adding mods and shared this with more and more friends that I figured it would be a good pack to release. Here it is in all its glory!

Specifically, I would like to mention the mod Paintings++. It is a great mod and the creator, AbsolemJackdaw, has requested I give credit to them. They even have a custom software that allows resource pack creation easily for use with Paintings++, and the mod Transparent also allows use of transparent images. The link can be found here: https://github.com/AbsolemJackdaw/PaintingPackMaker

While this pack is great, there are a few mods that are not listed on Modrinth. Here is a list of the mods not available via Modrinth:

- Inventory Sorting
- Item Scroller
- Litematica
- MaLiLib
- MiniHUD
- Music Player
- Paintings++
- Tweakeroo
- U Team Core
